jsonLd.title: Groww is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Groww in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Groww:
Groww is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww!
